doctrine_rules.description: Only AG69O approved pilot records may enter selector testing.
Candidate, evidence-pending and reviewed-only records are excluded from selector tests.
Recent output history must be checked before selecting a word.
If context is provided, selection priority is festival/observance theme → Tithi theme → Vara theme → general daily theme → no-repeat fallback.
Selector consumes already-reviewed context labels only; it does not calculate Tithi/Vara/Panchang values.
Selector test output is not public output and cannot replace generated/word-of-day.json.

tithi_vara_policy.note: Tithi/Vara may influence future selection only as reviewed context inputs. AG69P does not calculate or publish Panchang values.
